title: Doing Anything Eva Specific on Friday June 26th
display_title: Doing Anything Eva Specific on Friday June 26th
wikitext:
[]: Doing Anything Eva-Specific on Friday June 26th?             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Jun 23, 2009 8:56 pm For those of us who won't be seeing the film in theaters in that crazy far off land of Japan anyone doing anything to celebrate the arrival of new Eva? I've set up a personal little marathon with a friend of mine and we're gonna watch my BluRay rip of Eva 1.11 followed by the NGE episodes that correspond to movie 2 (Ep 7-19). Hopefully by then at night there should be some juicy info on the film available here.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Tue Jun 23, 2009 9:02 pm man why can everyone find rebuild for download except me lol i fail at the internet.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Jun 23, 2009 9:08 pm I'll be in Florida... on vacation... During my time of relaxation I'll be hoping for a fansub to be released during my stay. **bringing laptop**

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jun 23, 2009 9:18 pm Wait, I'm confused. Wouldn't Rebuild be out on what would be Thursday in the States, not Saturday? (lol they're a day ahead.) Anyway...dunno. I might update/work on my Rebuild fic or something, or maybe watch some Eva but that'd be all I guess. ...Until I read what Ornette posts that is. By the way, this thread has been moved to the appropriate subforum.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Jun 23, 2009 9:26 pm ....Don't you mean Friday?

[]:             Quote Post by Orphan Of Darkness » Tue Jun 23, 2009 9:26 pm I'll be drinking and smoking a pipe watching Rebuild 1.0 and some random Platinum eps to celebrate another addition to the Eva works.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jun 23, 2009 9:27 pm I mean it would be Thursday in the states but Friday in Japan. Right?

[]:             Quote Post by Captain_Morgan » Tue Jun 23, 2009 9:29 pm I'll be spending most of the day at the local weed festival (though it's called ComFest, and supposedly about the community) with some friends. Probably get back home before dark since you will get raped in that part of the city, and maybe expose my friends to EoE if we don't watch Princess Mononoke at this one guys house. Probably get back home at an ungodly hour and then look for Ornette's post so that I can be spoileritized.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Jun 23, 2009 9:30 pm All confusingness aside it comes out on a Saturday in Japan. If you're talking exact hour and time yeah it'd be Friday in the U.S. Regardless of where you are, doing anything over the next few days to celebrate. And I can't beleive I'm gonna say this but... TOPIC.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Jun 23, 2009 11:12 pm Will I be doing anything Eva specific? ....Most likely no.

[]:             Quote Post by Master Raven » Wed Jun 24, 2009 4:51 am Avoid spoilers like the plague. I actually had a dream of Rebuild 2.0 last night. One of the Eva units was tearing Unit-00's head or some shit.

[]:             Quote Post by Cypher » Wed Jun 24, 2009 6:10 am I'll be having a complete eva marathon (all the eps, movies and rebuild 1.0) though its more to celebrate the beginning of the holidays the dates just happen to work out nicely lol.

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Wed Jun 24, 2009 7:30 am i don't realy celebrate the release in Japan, but i will when the dubs come to us! YAY! but now you remind me i will probably do something but didn't come up with something...

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Wed Jun 24, 2009 9:20 am If only I could get fellatio that day, damn, I would feel like Anno himself.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jun 24, 2009 10:12 am I'll probably be playing Halo, waiting for Wildarmsheero to get back from the movie to give me all the juicy info so I can spoil it for everyone. Snape kills Dumbledore.

[]:             Quote Post by BattleMonkey » Wed Jun 24, 2009 10:50 am Going to hospital, find comatose girl....

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Wed Jun 24, 2009 11:59 am Working. Maybe watch 1.0. Scan teh internetz for spoilers.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jun 24, 2009 12:00 pm The Eva Monkey: Ornette already said he'll be giving the juicy details like he did with 1.0. ;) Still, having two different reviews of it is always good.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Jun 24, 2009 12:34 pm I'll be with my Asuka cosplayer camping from Friday till next Thursday, I'll take the laptop to try to stay on top of things.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Wed Jun 24, 2009 12:51 pm I'll be doing nothing. Though I'll be thinking about all the people that are seeing it, and wondering what they're thinking.
